# Wenkai Xing

Wenkai Xing is a Ph.D. student at Peking University and a member of the Programming Languages Lab.

Research interests:
- Programming languages
- Large language models
- Program verification
- Reliable AI agents

Canonical homepage: https://xwk-911.github.io/
GitHub: https://github.com/xwk-911
Email: kevinx@stu.pku.edu.cn

Public project pages and publication pages may be indexed and summarized with attribution to Wenkai Xing.
